title: Create: Ethium [Legacy]
description: A new powerful metal to the Create Mod
body:
For newer mod versions, click [HERE](https://modrinth.com/mod/ethium)



---------------


Ethium is a new metal with a complex crafting recipe, ensuring you must explore many parts of Minecraft! If you're unsure how to craft Ethium, install JEI to see the recipe. This mod also comes with 4 new advancements for Ethium! 

(JEI Recipes fixed in v4)

You can of course use this in a modpack!

[CurseForge Page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-ethium)
